task_completion.description: Locate the DELIVERY_DRONE robot in the Webots world.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Webots GUI is open and the Scene Tree panel shows the 'DELIVERY_DRONE' node selected or expanded.

task_completion.description: Find the four Propeller nodes (FRONT_RIGHT, FRONT_LEFT, REAR_RIGHT, REAR_LEFT).
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Scene Tree in Webots is expanded to reveal the Propeller nodes (e.g., FRONT_RIGHT, FRONT_LEFT, REAR_RIGHT, REAR_LEFT) under the drone's hierarchy.

task_completion.description: Set the first value of 'thrustConstants' to 0.00015 for the propellers.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Webots field editor (or a text editor modifying the .wbt file) shows 'thrustConstants' with its first numerical value set to 0.00015 for at least one Propeller node.

task_completion.description: Set the first value of 'torqueConstants' to 0.000006 for the propellers.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Webots field editor (or a text editor) shows 'torqueConstants' with its first numerical value set to 0.000006 (or 6e-06) for at least one Propeller node.

task_completion.description: Set the 'fastHelixThreshold' to 75.0 for the propellers.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Webots field editor (or a text editor) shows the 'fastHelixThreshold' field set to 75.0 for at least one Propeller node.
A 'Save World As' dialog in Webots showing the path '/home/ga/Desktop/tuned_quadcopter.wbt', or a terminal/file manager showing the newly created file on the Desktop.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the Webots GUI or a legitimate text editor to modify the world file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Webots interface or a code editor (like VS Code or Nano) being used, rather than just echoing text directly to a file from the terminal.

integrity.description: Agent modified the actual Propeller node properties.
integrity.visual_evidence: The values 0.00015, 0.000006, and 75.0 are entered into the correct specific fields (thrustConstants, torqueConstants, fastHelixThreshold) in the UI or file structure, not just typed as loose text.

integrity.description: Agent did not simply copy-paste a pre-made world file from an external unauthorized source.
integrity.visual_evidence: The trajectory shows the agent manually navigating the scene tree or file lines and inputting the required values.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected aerodynamic parameters are: thrustConstants (first value) = 0.00015, torqueConstants (first value) = 0.000006 (or 6e-06), and fastHelixThreshold = 75.0. There are 4 Propeller nodes to modify. The final world must be saved exactly to /home/ga/Desktop/tuned_quadcopter.wbt.
